title: Lettre d'adhésion de l'Albanie à l'EPPO
text_preview: REPUBLIC OF ALBANIA MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS The Right Honourable Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France Head of Political Affairs United Nations and International Organizations Service 37 Quai d'Orsay 75700 PARIS FRANCE Sir, of the Convention. The Govemment of Republic of Albania has examined the EPPO Convention and Rules of Procedure and agree…

pages.text:
REPUBLIC OF ALBANIA

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

The Right Honourable Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Head of Political Affairs

United Nations and International

Organizations Service 37 Quai d'Orsay 75700 PARIS

FRANCE

Sir,

of the Convention.

The Govemment of Republic of Albania has examined the EPPO

Convention and Rules of Procedure and agrees to contribute to the working costs of the Organization under the conditions stated in Article XVIII of the Convention and also its Schedule I.

The Official delegate of Republic of Albania to EPPO will be Irfan

TARELLI, Chief Inspector of Plant Protection Service.

Yours faithfully

Alfred SERREQI wort

MINISTER
